scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run lint && node scripts/checkRoleLabels.cjs
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.verify:nightly: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:perf
scripts.beta:up: docker compose up -d --build db backend frontend pgadmin
scripts.beta:seed: docker compose exec -T backend npx prisma generate && docker compose exec -T backend npm run migrate:readiness:deploy && docker compose exec -T backend npm run seed && docker compose exec -T backend npm run seed:beta && docker compose exec -T backend npm run preview:fixture
scripts.beta:validate: docker compose exec -T backend npm run test && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run test && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run test:e2e:smoke && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run test:e2e:beta && docker compose exec -T backend npm run smoke:routes
scripts.beta:check: npm run beta:capture:feed && npm run beta:validate
scripts.beta:bootstrap: npm run beta:up && npm run beta:seed
scripts.beta:snapshots: docker compose exec -T backend npm run preview:fixture && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run beta:snapshots
scripts.beta:load:synthetic: docker compose restart backend && docker compose exec -T backend env LOAD_TEST_BASE_URL=http://backend:4000 LOAD_TEST_USERNAME=beta_student1 LOAD_TEST_PASSWORD=BetaStudent123! LOAD_TEST_SEED=20260317 LOAD_TEST_DURATION=20 LOAD_TEST_SCALE=1.5 npm run load:test
scripts.beta:cycle4: npm run beta:check && npm run beta:snapshots && npm run beta:load:synthetic
scripts.beta:cycle5: npm run beta:check && npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run test:e2e:smoke -- tests/sheets.upload-html-workflow.smoke.spec.js tests/sheets.html-preview.sandbox.smoke.spec.js && docker compose exec -T backend npm run archive:html-originals
scripts.beta:cycle6: docker compose exec -T backend npm run migrate:readiness:smoke && npm run beta:check && npm run beta:snapshots && npm run beta:load:synthetic
scripts.ci:lighthouse: npm --prefix frontend/studyhub-app run build && npx --yes @lhci/cli@latest autorun --config frontend/studyhub-app/lighthouse.config.js
scripts.ci:a11y: echo 'Run a11y audit with: npx axe-cli http://localhost:4173'
scripts.ci:quality: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
